fundamentals.name: Astera Labs, Inc.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: Astera Labs, Inc. designs, manufactures, and sells semiconductor-based connectivity solutions for cloud and AI infrastructure. It offers an intelligent connectivity platform, comprised of semiconductor-based, high-speed, mixed-signal connectivity products that integrate a matrix of microcontrollers and sensors, and COSMOS. The company provides COSMOS software suite, a connectivity system management and optimization software that enables management and optimization of resources for large fleets at cloud-scale via link, fleet, and RAS management capabilities. In addition, it offers PCIe/CXL smart DSP retimers and cable modules; ethernet smart cable modules for cloud and AI infrastructure; CXL memory connectivity controllers; and smart fabric switches. The company serves hyperscalers and system original equipment manufacturers. Astera Labs, Inc. was incorporated in 2017 and is based in San Jose, California.

judgment.summary: High-growth, high-margin business with strong revenue and earnings expansion, albeit at a premium valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat estimates by 13.5%; next earnings date is 2026-08-04.
positives: Revenue growth 93.4% YoY and earnings growth 144.4% YoY indicate robust expansion.
Profit margin 26.7% and operating margin 20.1% demonstrate strong profitability.
Return on equity 21.1% and return on assets 10.1% show efficient capital utilization.
Current ratio 11.30 and quick ratio 10.55 indicate excellent short-term liquidity.
Free cash flow of $240M TTM provides operational flexibility.
negatives: Trailing P/E of 216.82 and Forward P/E of 75.77 indicate a very high valuation.
Price/Sales (TTM) of 54.55 is exceptionally high, suggesting aggressive growth expectations.
Debt/Equity ratio of 2.80 is elevated, though offset by strong liquidity.
Analyst mean target of $244.10 is below the current spot price, suggesting limited upside according to consensus.

news.paragraph: Astera Labs has seen significant positive momentum recently, with its stock climbing over 30% following two analyst upgrades and a price target increase from Barclays citing a strong product portfolio ramp-up. This surge follows a strong earnings report where the company beat estimates by 13.5%. The positive sentiment is amplified by the stock's recent 'golden cross' technical signal, suggesting continued upward potential.
